Willem Whisker is within the outer wall of Dol Guldur, up a slope to the north of Fennas Guldur. You have found Willem, and it seems that he has found…
Bingo is in the Haunted Inn, located in the Dourstocks of Mirkwood. You recovered an Orc-satchel found by Willem Whisker, and should bring it to Bingo…
Bingo wants to meet you outside the gate to Caras Galadhon, in Lothlórien. Bingo has seen enough of Mirkwood, and has decided to travel with you back …
Calengoth is at the docks of Lothlórien, west of Imlad Lalaith. Bingo believes that he has fallen prey to a curse causing him unnatural hunger pangs, …
Bingo is outside the gate to Caras Galadhon, in Lothlórien. Calengoth gave you a small packet of lembas to give to Bingo, and also forgave the hobbit …
